issue:
I would like to request a rescheduling of my  company "Company Name" HackerRank assessment due to unforeseen circumstances 
that prevented me from attending the test at the scheduled time.
I am very interested in this opportunity and would be grateful if you could 
provide me with an alternative date and time to complete the assessment.
Thank you for your understanding and support.
response:
To reschedule your assessment, you'll need to contact the company directly as candidates cannot reschedule assessments themselves through the HackerRank platform. The rescheduling process must be initiated by the company's hiring team who sent you the assessment.

The company can reschedule your assessment by logging into their HackerRank for Work account, going to the Interviews > Interview List, selecting your interview, clicking 'Invite Participants', and updating the date and time fields. They can also add email notes explaining the schedule change.

I recommend reaching out to your point of contact at the company to request the rescheduling due to your unforeseen circumstances. Source: [Reschedule an Interview Prerequisites Rescheduling an Interview]

The user is requesting to reschedule their assessment, which requires the company to take action. This is a standard product question that can be answered with available information.

issue: Hi, please pause our subscription. We have stopped all hiring efforts for now.
subject: Subscription pause
response:
You can pause your HackerRank subscription through the Pause Subscription feature. Here's how:

1. Click on your profile icon in the top-right corner and select Settings
2. Navigate to the Billing section under Subscription
3. Click the Cancel Plan button - this will display a prompt about the Pause Subscription feature
4. Select your desired pause duration (minimum 1 month, maximum 12 months)

Prerequisites for pausing:
- You must have an active subscription that started at least 30 days ago
- You must have a monthly subscription for Individual Monthly - Basic or Interview Monthly plans

This feature allows you to temporarily pause your subscription instead of canceling it, so you can resume whenever needed. You can also extend the pause period even during an active pause if necessary.

Source: Pause Subscription
justification: The user is requesting to pause their HackerRank subscription due to stopping hiring efforts. The corpus provides comprehensive coverage of the Pause Subscription feature, including step-by-step instructions, prerequisites, and extension options. This is a standard product feature request that can be fully addressed with the available documentation.

issue: Hello, I have completed an assessment, but my name is incorrect on the certificate. Can you please update it
subject: Certificate name update
response:
Yes, you can update the name on your certificate. You can update the name on your certificate only once per account, and when you update your name, the change applies to all your certificates. After you update it, you cannot change it again.

To update the name on your certificate:
1. Open your certificate page
2. In the Full Name field, enter the name you want to display
3. Click Regenerate Certificate
4. In the confirmation dialog, click Update Name

The platform will update your certificate with the new name.

Source: Certifications FAQs
justification: User requests certificate name correction, which is directly covered in the corpus. The HackerRank FAQ provides complete step-by-step instructions for updating certificate names with clear limitations (once per account only).

issue: I want Claude to stop crawling by website
subject: Website Data crawl
response:
Anthropic uses web crawlers to gather data from the public web for model development. To stop Claude from crawling your website, you can block the crawler by adding instructions to your robots.txt file in your top-level directory. To block the bot from your entire website, add these lines to your robots.txt file:

User-agent: ClaudeBot
Disallow: /

Please do this for every subdomain that you wish to opt out from. Anthropic's bots respect 'do not crawl' signals by honoring industry standard directives in robots.txt. You can also use the Crawl-delay extension to limit crawling frequency if you prefer to slow down rather than completely block crawling activity.

Source: Does Anthropic crawl data from the web, and how can site owners block the crawler?
justification: User wants to stop Claude from crawling their website. The corpus provides clear instructions on how to block Anthropic's ClaudeBot crawler using robots.txt directives. This is a standard product question with a direct answer in the documentation.

issue: i am a professor in a college and wanted to setup a claude lti key for my students
subject: Claude for students
response:
To set up Claude LTI for your students in Canvas, you'll need to follow these steps as a Canvas administrator:

**Creating Claude LTI Developer Key:**
1. Sign in as an administrator and navigate to Admin -> Developer Keys
2. Click "+ Developer Key" then "+ LTI Key"
3. Enter the following details:
   - Key Name: Claude LTI
   - Description: Enter a short description for the Canvas LTI 1.3 app
   - Redirect URIs: https://claude.ai/lti/launch
   - Title: Claude LTI
   - Target Link URI: https://claude.ai/lti/launch
   - OpenID Connect Initiation Url: https://claude.ai/api/lti/login
   - JWK method: https://claude.ai/api/lti/keys
4. Under Additional Settings, toggle Privacy Level to Public
5. Under Placements, remove defaults and add "Course Navigation" and "Assignment Edit"
6. Click "Save" and toggle the state to "On"

**Installing Claude LTI as an App:**
1. Go to Admin -> Settings -> Apps
2. Click "View App Configurations" then select "+ App"
3. Select Configuration Type "By Client ID"
4. Input the Client ID generated from your developer key
5. Click "Install" and refresh the course page

These steps are intended for Claude for Education administrators and LMS administrators.

Source: Set up the Claude LTI in Canvas by Instructure
justification: User is a professor requesting Claude LTI setup instructions for students. The corpus has comprehensive coverage of Claude LTI integration with Canvas, providing detailed step-by-step instructions. This is a standard product question with clear documentation available.

issue: i am in US Virgin Islands and the merchant is saying i have to spend minimum 10$ on my VISA card, why so?
subject: Visa card minimum spend
response: In the US Virgin Islands, merchants are permitted to require a minimum transaction amount of US$10 for Visa credit cards only. This is an exception that applies specifically in the USA and US territories like the US Virgin Islands, Puerto Rico, and Guam. However, this minimum applies only to credit cards - merchants cannot set minimums for Visa debit cards. If a merchant is requiring more than US$10 minimum on a credit card, or any minimum on a debit card, you should notify your Visa card issuer. Source: Can a merchant set a maximum or minimum limit for using my Visa card?
justification: Strong corpus match directly addresses the user's question about minimum spend requirements in US Virgin Islands. The excerpt explicitly covers this scenario and provides clear policy information.
